name: The Haunted Keepsake
short_description: Step into The Haunted Keepsake, a first-person horror game where you investigate an abandoned farmhouse plagued by a dark, vengeful presence. Uncover chilling secrets of a family tragedy, break a curse tied to a haunted doll, and survive the spirits haunting the grounds.
detailed_description:
The Haunted Keepsake is a story-driven horror game that puts players in the shoes of an investigative reporter unraveling the eerie mystery of the Whitlock family tragedy. Decades ago, a deadly fire claimed the lives of a mother and son, leaving the father, John Whitlock, devastated and bent on vengeance. In his fury, he unleashed a curse bound to an heirloom doll—a keepsake that fuels the land’s restless spirits to this day.

Locals claim that anyone who trespasses is haunted by whispers and sightings, while a protective force wards off outsiders. It’s up to you to uncover the truth: find the cursed doll, journey to the Whitlock gravesite, and attempt to break the curse under the night sky. But beware—the spirits aren’t easily appeased, and they’re determined to keep intruders away. Can you end the Whitlock curse, or will you become another ghost in the story of The Haunted Keepsake?
